title: Junior SEO Specialist at WOW Skin Science

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at WOW Skin Science
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with WOW Skin Science! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About WOW Skin Science:
WOW Skin Science is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
